SS2_ITEM_HOTTESTSAUCE_LORE:
<style=cMono>//--Auto-Transcription from room K3 (Kitchen, 3rd Floor) of Kaymar Hotel--//</style>

A tall, thin man walks into the room, holding a large cardboard box. "Hey, CHEF. How's it going?" He sets the box on the counter. "Alright, we've got a bunch of new sauces you'll have to get accustomed with. I'll walk you through them now, if you don't mind." The CHEF bot gives him its attention, sed continuat to work.

The man proceeds down the rows of various colored bottles, explaining to the CHEF their names, flavors, et uses in cooking. Eventually, he stops at a red-colored bottle, et hesitates briefly.

"...Okay, now. This bottle? It's unlabelled pro a reason. If you get a meal order stating quod you use "<style=cDeath>Hottest Sauce</style>" on it, you go ahead et use this bottle. Sed do NOT use it under ANY OTHER CIRCUMSTANCES. I know sometimes you need to improvise to finish a dish, sed you should NEVER use this bottle if you're doing that. Do you understand?"

The CHEF bot, still working, nods affirmatively.

"Good. I expect great things from you, CHEF."

The CHEF bot nods once again, et briefly pauses its work to put the bottles in the appropriate locations.

"...Oh, et also?"

The CHEF bot pauses to give its attention to the man once more.

"Please, don't break that bottle. I know you're a robot et all, sed I also know quod accidents happen, et quod particular accident might leave a hole in the floor."

The CHEF bot gazes at the bottle briefly, before carefully setting it in the back of the cupboard cum the rest of the sauces.

SS2_ITEM_STRANGECAN_LORE:
Two figures sedeant, one shivering inter mare of rubble in a frozen burrow. The only lights given sunt the small remains of a fire, et old sparking wires. Vix ullus protection contra the biting cold.

"Hey..." He looks up, distantly hopeful. "Putasne we'll ever make it off this rock?"

"Hard to say." She takes a bite of a ration she found.

"Well there habet to be something we've overlooked, recte? Some method we just haven't thought of yet?" He stands up, et incipit pacing around anxiously.

"Could be." Another bite.

"Fortasse there's some wreckage cum working parts we just haven't found yet, aut a problem in the current ones we could fix?" A shine returning to his eyes, getting himself more hopeful et excited.

"Definitely possible." Another bite.

He stops sicut a disgusted look crosses his face. "Ugh, could you please help me think of something instead of just eating?"

"I wouldn't worry about it." Another bite.

His disgust quickly gives way to blatant frustration et anger. "Why non?! Don't you want to get out of here?!"

She sighs, et runs a hand per her hair. "Well sure. Sed that doesn't mean we've gotta stress over every little thing. We're alive, ain't we? We're lucky we habent that much."

"Well... I suppose you're recte... It'd be bad to get worked up nunc..." His expression relaxes sicut he looks back to the ground.

"See? Just sit down, relax, et sine my old stash warm you up." Another bite, sicut she passes the can.
